reference: Replace this with the expected grounded answer from official university sources.
response:
The Directorate of Admissions serves as the primary point of contact for prospective students for admission to various programmes at the Central University of Kashmir [1]. The Directorate manages the entire admissions process, from disseminating information about programmes, eligibility, and other requirements to registering and processing applications. The Directorate also offers counselling to students applying to various programmes and addresses other admissions-related queries.

For Ph.D. Programme session 2025-2026, the admission is provisional subject to final verification of documents & eligibility by the concerned department/Nodal Officer [2], [3], [4], [5]. The instructions for provisional admission are as follows:

1. The admission shall be provisional subject to final verification of documents & eligibility by the concerned department/Nodal Officer.
2. The students must deposit requisite fee by logging to their SAMARTH account on which they have registered by or before the specified dates (9th October, 2025 for Mathematics; 5th November, 2025 for Economics; and 6th October, 2025 for Urdu and English).
3. Provisionally selected candidates are required to bring following original documents & self-attested photocopies at the time of joining: - All the marks sheets of qualifying degree/examination & valid category certificate issued by the concerned department/Nodal Officer.

Please note that the admission process may vary depending on the programme and department. For more information, please visit the official website of Central University of Kashmir or contact the Directorate of Admissions directly [1].

user_input: What is the admission process at Central University of Kashmir?

reference: Replace this with the expected grounded answer from official university sources.
response:
According to the provided context, students can find official notices on the Central University of Kashmir's website. Specifically:

* [1] The "Material Feedback Viva-Voce" section provides information about the viva-voce conducted on 04th December 2025.
* [3] The "Shazia result_upload_summary.xlsx" document contains a note stating that students can obtain Photostat copy of Answer Scripts within 7-days on fulfilment of required formalities, and for any query, they can contact Facilitation/Enquiry Counters of EEW (CUK) during official hours.
* [4] The "Promotion_Result_of_Resut_Awaited_2021.xlsx" document contains a note stating that students can contact Facilitation/Enquiry Counters of EEW (CUK) during official hours on all working days for any query.
* [5] The "Shazia result_upload_summary.xlsx" document contains a note stating that students can obtain Photostat copy of Answer Scripts within 7-days on fulfilment of required formalities, and for any query, they can contact Facilitation/Enquiry Counters of EEW (CUK) during official hours.

These notices are available at the following URLs:

* [1] https://cukapi.disgenweb.in/p/scholarresults/1768201095648-RN-2197.pdf
* [3] https://cukapi.disgenweb.in/p/examinationresult/1768900195695-Cir_RN_2198.pdf
* [4] https://cukapi.disgenweb.in/p/examinationresult/1767697770725-CIR_RN_2196.pdf
* [5] https://cukapi.disgenweb.in/p/examinationresult/1770533447753-Cir_RN_2203.pdf

Students can also contact the Facilitation/Enquiry Counters of EEW (CUK) during official hours for any query or information.
